scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:frontend: wait-on tcp:8081 && cd frontend && bun run dev
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../frontend && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck
